faqs.question: What is TrueCircle?
faqs.answer: TrueCircle is an emotional wellness companion app with guided check-ins, journaling, CBT tools, and relationship insights.

faqs.question: Do I need to complete Emotional Check-In first?
faqs.answer: Yes. On first setup, Emotional Check-In is mandatory before entering the main dashboard.

faqs.question: Can I use the app in offline mode?
faqs.answer: Yes. Most reflection features and local content continue to work offline. Your entries stay on device.

faqs.question: What changes when I switch to online mode?
faqs.answer: Online mode enables network-dependent actions such as subscription-related billing requests and remote support flows.

faqs.question: How do rewards and coins work?
faqs.answer: You earn coins from daily usage and form submissions. Coins can be used for wallet actions like discount redemption and temporary upgrade offers.

faqs.question: Why is subscription action disabled sometimes?
faqs.answer: Subscription and billing actions are available only in online mode. Enable online mode from Settings.

faqs.question: Are screening tests available?
faqs.answer: Yes. Dashboard includes Screening Tests with GAD-7 and PHQ-9 forms.

faqs.question: Is my data private?
faqs.answer: TrueCircle is designed for privacy-first usage with local storage flows for personal entries. Please review Privacy Policy for complete details.

faqs.question: Does TrueCircle replace professional therapy?
faqs.answer: No. It supports self-reflection and emotional tracking, but it is not a replacement for licensed medical or mental health care.

faqs.question: How can I contact support?
faqs.answer: Open Settings and use the WhatsApp support button. You can also reach the team at hi@truecircleai.com.
